codebase_shape_delete_inventory_graph.postgresqlSql: DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid; DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid; DELETE FROM inventory.code_relationships WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid; DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid); DELETE FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid; DELETE FROM inventory.code_projects WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid
codebase_shape_delete_inventory_graph.sqlServerSql: DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_object_flow_observations WHERE code_repository_id = ?; DELETE FROM decisioning.codebase_shape_action_observations WHERE code_repository_id = ?; DELETE FROM inventory.code_relationships WHERE code_repository_id = ?; DELETE FROM inventory.code_symbols WHERE code_file_id IN (SELECT code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = ?); DELETE FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = ?; DELETE FROM inventory.code_projects WHERE code_repository_id = ?

codebase_shape_fetch_file_ids_for_reposi.postgresqlSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = %s::uuid
codebase_shape_fetch_file_ids_for_reposi.sqlServerSql: SELECT file_path, code_file_id FROM inventory.code_files WHERE code_repository_id = ?

codebase_shape_insert_file_if_missing.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_files (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, symbol_count, metadata_json) VALUES (COALESCE(%s::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (file_path) DO UPDATE SET code_repository_id = EXCLUDED.code_repository_id, code_project_id = EXCLUDED.code_project_id, relative_path = EXCLUDED.relative_path, language = EXCLUDED.language, extension = EXCLUDED.extension, line_count = EXCLUDED.line_count, sha256 = EXCLUDED.sha256, symbol_count = EXCLUDED.symbol_count, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_file_id
codebase_shape_insert_file_if_missing.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_files AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_file_id, ? AS code_repository_id, ? AS code_project_id, ? AS file_path, ? AS relative_path, ? AS language, ? AS extension, ? AS line_count, ? AS sha256, ? AS symbol_count, ? AS metadata_json) AS src ON target.file_path = src.file_path WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET code_repository_id = src.code_repository_id, code_project_id = src.code_project_id, relative_path = src.relative_path, language = src.language, extension = src.extension, line_count = src.line_count, sha256 = src.sha256, symbol_count = src.symbol_count, metadata_json = src.metadata_json WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, symbol_count, metadata_json) VALUES (src.code_file_id, src.code_repository_id, src.code_project_id, src.file_path, src.relative_path, src.language, src.extension, src.line_count, src.sha256, src.symbol_count, src.metadata_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_file_id;

codebase_shape_upsert_project.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_projects (code_project_id, code_repository_id, project_path, relative_path, name, project_type, language, metadata_json) VALUES (COALESCE(%s::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (code_repository_id, project_path) DO UPDATE SET relative_path = EXCLUDED.relative_path, name = EXCLUDED.name, project_type = EXCLUDED.project_type, language = EXCLUDED.language, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_project_id
codebase_shape_upsert_project.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_projects AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_project_id, ? AS code_repository_id, ? AS project_path, ? AS relative_path, ? AS name, ? AS project_type, ? AS language, ? AS metadata_json) AS src ON target.code_repository_id = src.code_repository_id AND target.project_path = src.project_path WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET relative_path = src.relative_path, name = src.name, project_type = src.project_type, language = src.language, metadata_json = src.metadata_json WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (code_project_id, code_repository_id, project_path, relative_path, name, project_type, language, metadata_json) VALUES (src.code_project_id, src.code_repository_id, src.project_path, src.relative_path, src.name, src.project_type, src.language, src.metadata_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_project_id;

codebase_shape_upsert_file.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_files (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json) VALUES (COALESCE(%s::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (file_path) DO UPDATE SET code_repository_id = EXCLUDED.code_repository_id, code_project_id = EXCLUDED.code_project_id, relative_path = EXCLUDED.relative_path, language = EXCLUDED.language, extension = EXCLUDED.extension, line_count = EXCLUDED.line_count, sha256 = EXCLUDED.sha256, content_text = EXCLUDED.content_text, symbol_count = EXCLUDED.symbol_count, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_file_id
codebase_shape_upsert_file.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_files AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_file_id, ? AS code_repository_id, ? AS code_project_id, ? AS file_path, ? AS relative_path, ? AS language, ? AS extension, ? AS line_count, ? AS sha256, ? AS content_text, ? AS symbol_count, ? AS metadata_json) AS src ON target.file_path = src.file_path WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET code_repository_id = src.code_repository_id, code_project_id = src.code_project_id, relative_path = src.relative_path, language = src.language, extension = src.extension, line_count = src.line_count, sha256 = src.sha256, content_text = src.content_text, symbol_count = src.symbol_count, metadata_json = src.metadata_json WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json) VALUES (src.code_file_id, src.code_repository_id, src.code_project_id, src.file_path, src.relative_path, src.language, src.extension, src.line_count, src.sha256, src.content_text, src.symbol_count, src.metadata_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_file_id;

codebase_shape_upsert_symbol.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_symbols (code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s, %s) ON CONFLICT (code_symbol_id) DO UPDATE SET symbol_name = EXCLUDED.symbol_name, qualified_name = EXCLUDED.qualified_name, symbol_kind = EXCLUDED.symbol_kind, line_number = EXCLUDED.line_number, end_line_number = EXCLUDED.end_line_number, container_name = EXCLUDED.container_name, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, symbol_hash = EXCLUDED.symbol_hash, signature = EXCLUDED.signature, visibility = EXCLUDED.visibility, layer_code = EXCLUDED.layer_code, domain_code = EXCLUDED.domain_code, parent_symbol_id = EXCLUDED.parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point = EXCLUDED.is_entry_point, is_exported = EXCLUDED.is_exported, is_abstract = EXCLUDED.is_abstract, enrichment_status = EXCLUDED.enrichment_status RETURNING code_symbol_id
codebase_shape_upsert_symbol.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_symbols AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_symbol_id, ? AS code_file_id, ? AS symbol_name, ? AS qualified_name, ? AS symbol_kind, ? AS line_number, ? AS end_line_number, ? AS container_name, ? AS metadata_json, ? AS symbol_hash, ? AS signature, ? AS visibility, ? AS layer_code, ? AS domain_code, ? AS parent_symbol_id, ? AS is_entry_point, ? AS is_exported, ? AS is_abstract, ? AS enrichment_status) AS src ON target.code_symbol_id = src.code_symbol_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET symbol_name = src.symbol_name, qualified_name = src.qualified_name, symbol_kind = src.symbol_kind, line_number = src.line_number, end_line_number = src.end_line_number, container_name = src.container_name, metadata_json = src.metadata_json, symbol_hash = src.symbol_hash, signature = src.signature, visibility = src.visibility, layer_code = src.layer_code, domain_code = src.domain_code, parent_symbol_id = src.parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point = src.is_entry_point, is_exported = src.is_exported, is_abstract = src.is_abstract, enrichment_status = src.enrichment_status WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (...) VALUES (...) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_symbol_id;

codebase_shape_upsert_relationship.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_relationships (code_relationship_id, code_repository_id, source_file_id, source_symbol_id, target_file_id, target_symbol_id, target_ref, relationship_type, metadata_json) VALUES (COALESCE(%s::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s, %s, %s::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (code_repository_id, source_file_id, source_symbol_id, target_file_id, target_symbol_id, target_ref, relationship_type) DO UPDATE SET metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_relationship_id
codebase_shape_upsert_relationship.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_relationships AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_relationship_id, ? AS code_repository_id, ? AS source_file_id, ? AS source_symbol_id, ? AS target_file_id, ? AS target_symbol_id, ? AS target_ref, ? AS relationship_type, ? AS metadata_json) AS src ON target.code_repository_id = src.code_repository_id AND ISNULL(target.source_file_id, '') = ISNULL(src.source_file_id, '') AND ISNULL(target.source_symbol_id, '') = ISNULL(src.source_symbol_id, '') AND ISNULL(target.target_file_id, '') = ISNULL(src.target_file_id, '') AND ISNULL(target.target_symbol_id, '') = ISNULL(src.target_symbol_id, '') AND ISNULL(target.target_ref, '') = ISNULL(src.target_ref, '') AND target.relationship_type = src.relationship_type WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET metadata_json = src.metadata_json WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (...) VALUES (...) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_relationship_id;

codebase_shape_upsert_repository.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO inventory.code_repositories (code_repository_id, repo_key, root_path, name, primary_language, metadata_json) VALUES (COALESCE(%s::uuid, gen_random_uuid()), %s, %s, %s, %s, %s::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (root_path) DO UPDATE SET repo_key = EXCLUDED.repo_key, name = EXCLUDED.name, primary_language = EXCLUDED.primary_language, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, last_scanned_at = NOW() RETURNING code_repository_id
codebase_shape_upsert_repository.sqlServerSql: MERGE inventory.code_repositories AS target USING (SELECT ? AS code_repository_id, ? AS repo_key, ? AS root_path, ? AS name, ? AS primary_language, ? AS metadata_json) AS src ON target.root_path = src.root_path WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET repo_key = src.repo_key, name = src.name, primary_language = src.primary_language, metadata_json = src.metadata_json, last_scanned_at = SYSUTCDATETIME() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (code_repository_id, repo_key, root_path, name, primary_language, metadata_json) VALUES (src.code_repository_id, src.repo_key, src.root_path, src.name, src.primary_language, src.metadata_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.code_repository_id;
